name: Atomic Eagle Ltd
analysis: AEU has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.4700. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.5700, stop A$0.3317, target A$0.7500 (0.76:1) — then trail it.
